nasb.text: From the base on the ground to the lower ledge shall be two cubits and the width one cubit; and from the smaller ledge to the larger ledge shall be four cubits and the width one cubit.

esv.text: from the base on the ground to the lower ledge, two cubits, with a breadth of one cubit; and from the smaller ledge to the larger ledge, four cubits, with a breadth of one cubit;

cnv.text: 從底座到下層的臺座，高一公尺，邊緣寬五十公分；從小臺座到大臺座，高二公尺，邊緣寬五十公分。

ccb.text: 从底座到下层台座高一米，边宽五十厘米，下层台座到上一层高二米，边宽五十厘米。
